page: Microsoft Azure NC24s_v3 is a virtual server instance within the NCSv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The hardware configuration features 24 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 Intel processor architecture. It is equipped with 448.0 GB of system memory, which provides a high resource density of 18.67 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server is bundled with four GPUs to support parallel computing operations. For data storage, the instance includes 3019 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the combination of dedicated processing cores, a large memory footprint, and multiple GPUs, this instance is structured for resource-intensive workloads. It is suitable for deep learning training, high-performance computing simulations, GPU-accelerated databases, and large-scale data processing tasks.
